contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Automated dao-client npm publishing: publish-on-version-bump (gated, idempotent)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/73
  
  Details:
  Made @truesight_dao/dao-client publishing fully automatic (dao_protocol PR #73). Upgraded npm-publish-dao-client.yml: on any push to main that changes packages/dao-client/package.json, CI installs, runs the runtime smoke test (npm test) as a publish gate, then publishes only if that exact version isn't already on npm. So a release is now just: bump the version in a PR → merge → it self-publishes — no manual workflow_dispatch, no token handling (uses the existing NPM_TOKEN GitHub Actions secret, never on the box). Idempotent (already-published version = no-op, so unrelated package.json edits and re-runs are safe) and gated (a failing smoke test blocks the publish). Retained workflow_dispatch + dao-client-v* tag triggers. To ship 1.1.0 final now: bump 1.1.0-rc.1 → 1.1.0 and merge.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
